ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., typing test, mouse movement analysis) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment session took place */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment settings */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keystrokes" (
  "keystroke_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keystroke */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment session during which the keystroke was recorded */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key pressed or released */,
  "operation" INTEGER /* Operation performed (e.g., press, release) */,
  "pX" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the mouse pointer */,
  "pY" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the mouse pointer */,
  "LR" INTEGER /* Left or right mouse button */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State of the keyboard (e.g., shift, ctrl) */,
  "delta" REAL /* Time difference between keystrokes */,
  "time_diff" REAL /* Time difference since the beginning of the experiment */,
  "time_since_beginning" REAL /* Time since the beginning of the experiment */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the key press in milliseconds */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the key press was correct */,
  "hand_used" TEXT /* Hand used for the key press */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keystroke_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keystrokes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mouse_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mouse movement */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment session during which the movement was recorded */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the mouse pointer */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the mouse pointer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the movement */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Speed of the mouse movement */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the mouse movement */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered by the mouse movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mouse_movements_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaze_tracking" (
  "gaze_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaze tracking event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment session during which the event was recorded */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the gaze */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the gaze */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "distance_from_screen" REAL /* Distance of the user from the screen */,
  "pupil_dilation" REAL /* Pupil dilation during the gaze event */,
  "fixation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the fixation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gaze_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaze_tracking_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment session */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the user's performance */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the user's performance */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "accuracy_by_section" TEXT /* Accuracy of the user's performance by section */,
  "speed_by_section" TEXT /* Speed of the user's performance by section */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the experiment */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the user */,
  "professional_background" TEXT /* Professional background of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment design */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment design was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_designs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment design */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the stimulus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES experiment_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the user to respond */,
  "response_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the user's response */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the user's response */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user after the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis result */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data for the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model result was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
